name: mlx-code-completion
description: Low-latency AI code completion powered by local MLX models on Apple Silicon

mlxCompletion.modelPath.description: Path to MLX model dir. Empty = auto (prefers ~/.mlx-models/Qwen2.5-Coder-3B-4bit base FIM model).

mlxCompletion.quantization.description: Quantization level (only applied if the checkpoint is not already quantized)

mlxCompletion.maxTokens.description: Max tokens for FIM/mid-line completions (intent uses more, early-stops when complete).

mlxCompletion.contextLinesBefore.description: Upper bound on lines before cursor. Adaptive context uses less for FIM.

mlxCompletion.contextLinesAfter.description: Upper bound on lines after cursor.

mlxCompletion.speculative.description: Phase D: enable speculative decoding with a smaller draft model (same quality, faster long decode).

mlxCompletion.draftModelPath.description: Optional path to draft model for speculative decoding. Empty = auto-pick a smaller sibling under ~/.mlx-models (e.g. 0.5B for a 7B target). Disable with mlxCompletion.speculative=false.

mlxCompletion.numDraftTokens.description: Draft tokens proposed per verification step (higher can help long intent bodies if accept rate stays high).

mlxCompletion.dualModel.description: Phase E: use a smaller model for single-line mid-expression FIM (quality model kept for multi-line bodies and comments).

mlxCompletion.fastModelPath.description: Optional path to the fast mid-line model. Empty = auto (prefers 3B Instruct, then 3B base). Disable dual routing with mlxCompletion.dualModel=false.
